intended_use: The Deep Learning Image Reconstruction option is intended for head, whole body, cardiac, and vascular CT scans.
intended_use_full: The Deep Learning Image Reconstruction option is intended for head, whole body, cardiac, and vascular CT scans.
ground_truth: Comparison of reconstructions from identical raw datasets; radiologist assessment on 5-point Likert scale
other_metrics: Low Contrast Detectability (LCD), Image Noise (pixel standard deviation), High-Contrast Spatial Resolution (MTF), Streak Artifact Suppression, Spatial Resolution longitudinal (FWHM slice sensitivity profile), Noise Power Spectrum (NPS), CT Number Uniformity, CT Number Accuracy, Contrast to Noise (CNR) ratio, Artifact analysis. Reader study: 5-point Likert scale assessment of image quality; comparisons of image noise texture, image sharpness, and image noise texture homogeneity showed significantly better subjective image quality than ASiR-V.
